title: Mini Minecraft
description: Makes the players in a world 2x larger, making the world seem small
body:
Cute little datapack, making the players big for a small world experience.

All players on a server (or singleplayer world) are scaled up by a factor of 2 with a few other tweaks to make the world feel truly tiny.

Works really well with the [F8thful texture pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/f8thful)

![Screenshot in a village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8naL1IzI/images/2a0d2e10ba1d5959721a717bdd793e79f7b157b9.png)

If you have any questions please contact us on: [Discord](https://discord.gg/qM7mQtcJPW)
